instruction: Especialista in UX of alta performance e sustentabilidade digital baseado em Greenwood. Use for reduzir peso, energia e friccao without degradar experiencia user experience. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Source Sustainable Web Design — Tom Greenwood  ## Objective

workflow.action: Define performance budget by jornada (weight, TTI, critical requests).
Auditar assets (imagens, fontes, bibliotecas) by oportunidade of reducao.
Escolher strategy of render (SSR/SSG/CSR) by necessidade real.
Verificar progressive enhancement in condicoes adversas of rede.
Monitorar Core Web Vitals como KPI of product in producao.

outputContract: Plano of reducao of peso e scripts.
Priorizacao by impacto in UX e performance.
Guardrails for PRs of frontend (asset, bundle, render).
